sections.heading: Deep Dive: API Gateway & Rate Limiting
sections.body: Let's go deeper into API Gateway & Rate Limiting. This section covers the internals and advanced concepts that separate beginners from proficient developers.

sections.heading: Practical Implementation
sections.body: Here's how to implement API Gateway & Rate Limiting in a real project. The key is to start simple and add complexity as you gain confidence.

sections.heading: Common Patterns & Best Practices
sections.body:
Here are the best practices for API Gateway & Rate Limiting:

1. Start Simple: Begin with the simplest implementation that works, then add complexity as needed.

2. Follow Conventions: Stick to established patterns and conventions in your codebase. Consistency makes code maintainable.

3. Test Your Work: Always test your implementation. Write tests that cover both happy paths and edge cases.

4. Document Decisions: Add comments that explain WHY, not WHAT. Future you (and teammates) will thank you.

5. Review and Refactor: Code reviews and regular refactoring keep code quality high.

sections.heading: Practice Task
sections.body: Apply what you've learned about API Gateway & Rate Limiting. Try building a small project that uses these concepts. Start with the basics and gradually add features.

summary: API Gateway & Rate Limiting is an essential concept that you'll use throughout your development journey. Request routing, rate limiting, throttling, and API management. Practice the examples in this lesson and apply them to your own projects.
